mapper.select: SELECT c.*, g.group_name FROM crm_group_contact c LEFT JOIN crm_group g ON c.group_id = g.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_group_contact (id, group_id, contact_name, contact_phone, position_name, department_name, status, source_type, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted_flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{groupId}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{positionName}, #{departmentName}, #{status}, #{sourceType}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), #{updatedBy}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE crm_group_contact SET contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, position_name = #{positionName}, department_name = #{departmentName}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE crm_group_contact SET deleted_flag = 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.change_type AS changeType, s.before_contact_name AS beforeContactName, s.after_contact_name AS afterContactName, s.before_contact_phone AS beforeContactPhone, s.after_contact_phone AS afterContactPhone, s.before_department_name AS beforeDepartmentName, s.after_department_name AS afterDepartmentName, s.before_position_name AS beforePositionName, s.after_position_name AS afterPositionName, t.submit_time AS changeTime FROM wf_ticket_contact_snapshot s JOIN wf_ticket t ON s.ticket_id = t.id WHERE s.contact_id = #{contactId} ORDER BY t.submit_time DESC
